narration: Your attention is a limited battery.
visual_description: Hook visual: Your attention is a limited battery.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Your attention is a limited battery.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Your attention is a limited battery.

narration: Just like your phone, your brain has a finite amount of focus.
visual_description: Context visual: Just like your phone, your brain has a finite amount of focus.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Just like your phone, your brain has a finite amount of focus.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Just like your phone, your brain has a finite amount of focus.

narration: This concept is called selective attention. It’s how you prioritize information.
visual_description: Escalation visual: This concept is called selective attention. It’s how you prioritize information.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: This concept is called selective attention. It’s how you prioritize information.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: This concept is called selective attention. It’s how you prioritize information.

narration: Cognitive load affects how much you can focus. More distractions? More mental drain.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Cognitive load affects how much you can focus. More distractions? More mental drain.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Cognitive load affects how much you can focus. More distractions? More mental drain.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Cognitive load affects how much you can focus. More distractions? More mental drain.

narration: So, if you feel drained, it’s not your fault. You’re just managing your brain’s battery.
